subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O Thou through Whose Name the hearts of the ardent have found solace, and by Whose remembrance the souls of the sincere have taken wing [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا من باسمک استانست افئده المشتاقین و بذکرک طارت قلوب الموحدین و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for firmness in the Covenant, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @love of God
